name: Welcome — New Client
subject: Thanks for booking with Momentos by Chris, {{first_name}}!
html_content:
Welcome {{first_name}}

Chris here. Glad to be working with you on your event. I'll be in touch shortly with next steps.

name: Quote Follow-Up
subject: Your Quinceañera quote — Momentos by Chris
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your quote is attached. Let me know if you have questions or want to adjust the package.

name: Deposit Receipt
subject: Your deposit receipt — Momentos by Chris
html_content: Got your deposit of {{amount}}. You're officially on the calendar. See you at the event.

name: Booking Reminder
subject: Your {{event_name}} is {{days}} days out
html_content: Quick heads-up — {{event_name}} is coming up. Time to confirm your final headcount and any last-minute details.
